findings.evidence: `rg` shows the existing general theorem at `TauCeti/LowDimTopology/Plumbing/Weight.lean:181`: `theorem characteristicWeight_single (k : P.characteristicVectors) (v : V)`, while the new proof at `Conjugation.lean:118` starts with `rw [characteristicWeight_single]` and then only simplifies `conjugate_val`/`canonicalCharacteristic_apply`.
findings.fix: Remove this theorem, or at least do not expose it as a new simp API; use `characteristicWeight_single` with `conjugate_val` and `canonicalCharacteristic_apply` at call sites needing this value.
findings.issue: `characteristicWeight_conjugate_canonical_single` is a special-case parallel API for the already-existing `@[simp]` theorem `characteristicWeight_single`, creating overlapping simp rules for the same basis-sphere weight shape.

summary: The main conjugation symmetry appears genuinely new, but the PR adds a separate simp theorem for a basis-sphere value already covered by the existing general single-basis weight API.
